# Relebactam 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Relebactam 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Relebactam</strong> 目前有 <strong>17 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Relebactam 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：See EMA product information</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>pyelonephritis（99.4%）</li>
<li>polyclonal hyperviscosity syndrome（99.2%）</li>
<li>hyperamylasemia（99.2%）</li>
<li>congenital analbuminemia（99.1%）</li>
<li>blood group incompatibility（98.9%）</li>
<li>premalignant hematological system disease（98.8%）</li>
<li>monoclonal gammopathy（98.8%）</li>
<li>hematological disease associated with an acquired peripheral neuropathy（98.6%）</li>
<li>hematopoietic and lymphoid system neoplasm（98.5%）</li>
<li>congenital hematological disorder（98.4%）</li>
<li>septicemic plague（97.9%）</li>
<li>pneumonia（96.5%）</li>
<li>ureter tuberculosis（96.4%）</li>
<li>tumor of testis and paratestis（96.3%）</li>
<li>chondroid hamartoma（96.1%）</li>
<li>ductal or ductular proliferation（96.1%）</li>
<li>non-seminomatous lesion（96.1%）</li>
<li>bronchial adenomas/carcinoids childhood（96.1%）</li>
<li>mesenchymoma（96.1%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of tongue（96.1%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/relebactam/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
